title: NY drivers pay billions. Why are we still dodging potholes? (Guest Opinion by Justin Wilcox)
summary: Opinion piece by Justin Wilcox (Upstate United) critiques New York State's road maintenance despite substantial driver funding. Raises constituent concerns about pothole infrastructure and questions efficiency of current road-bridge maintenance investments.

political_signal.description: Business/taxpayer advocacy organization raising public scrutiny of road maintenance outcomes relative to funding levels; implies accountability gap in infrastructure spending
